requirements_addressed: Create DesignDecision dataclass with all specified fields, entity_id, to_episode_body
Create ApiContract dataclass with all specified fields, entity_id, to_episode_body
Create DataModel dataclass with all specified fields, entity_id, to_episode_body
All entities follow frozen dataclass pattern with entity_id and to_episode_body
Unit tests for each entity class covering creation, entity_id, serialisation

completion_promises.criterion_text: Create guardkit/knowledge/entities/design_decision.py with DesignDecision dataclass - Fields: number, title, context, decision, rationale, alternatives_considered, consequences, related_components, status, superseded_by, supersedes - entity_id property: DDR-{NNN:03d} - to_episode_body() method
completion_promises.evidence: Created design_decision.py with frozen DesignDecision dataclass containing all specified fields (number, title, context, decision, rationale, alternatives_considered, consequences, related_components, status, superseded_by, supersedes). entity_id property returns DDR-{NNN:03d} format. to_episode_body() returns domain data with conditional inclusion of optional fields (alternatives_considered excluded when empty, superseded_by/supersedes excluded when None). 16 tests verify all aspects.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Create guardkit/knowledge/entities/api_contract.py with ApiContract dataclass - Fields: bounded_context, consumer_types (list), endpoints (list of dicts), protocol (REST/GraphQL/MCP/A2A/ACP), version - entity_id property: API-{bounded_context_slug} - to_episode_body() method
completion_promises.evidence: Created api_contract.py with frozen ApiContract dataclass containing all specified fields (bounded_context, consumer_types, endpoints, protocol, version). entity_id property uses _slugify() to generate API-{bounded_context_slug} format. to_episode_body() returns all domain data. Supports all 5 protocols (REST, GraphQL, MCP, A2A, ACP). 12 tests verify all aspects including slug truncation and special character handling.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Create guardkit/knowledge/entities/data_model.py with DataModel dataclass - Fields: entities (list of dicts with name, attributes, relationships), invariants, bounded_context - entity_id property: DM-{bounded_context_slug} - to_episode_body() method
completion_promises.evidence: Created data_model.py with frozen DataModel dataclass containing all specified fields (bounded_context, entities as list of dicts with name/attributes/relationships, invariants). entity_id property uses _slugify() to generate DM-{bounded_context_slug} format. to_episode_body() returns all domain data. 12 tests verify all aspects.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All three entities follow the established pattern (frozen dataclass, entity_id property, to_episode_body)
completion_promises.evidence: All three entities use @dataclass(frozen=True), have entity_id as @property, implement to_episode_body() returning domain-only dicts (no _metadata per ADR-GBF-001). Pattern matches ArchitectureDecision, ComponentDef, SystemContextDef, CrosscuttingConcernDef. Tests explicitly verify frozen behavior (test_frozen_dataclass), entity_id format, and episode body structure with no metadata.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests for each entity class (creation, entity_id, serialisation)
completion_promises.evidence: Created test_design_entities.py with 40 tests across 3 test classes (TestDesignDecision: 16 tests, TestApiContract: 12 tests, TestDataModel: 12 tests). Tests cover: creation/instantiation, entity_id format/padding/determinism/truncation, to_episode_body structure/no-metadata/JSON-serializable, optional field defaults, mutable default isolation, frozen immutability, special character handling, and edge cases. 100% line coverage on all 3 source files.

Updated __init__.py to import DesignDecision, ApiContract, and DataModel from their respective modules and added them to __all__ list. Updated module docstring to include new entities. All imports verified working via test execution.
